creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
John Marino wrote:
> I tried removing the first "." on the offending lines, it didn't help. 
> Please advise how to fix files/Makefile so it builds on FreeBSD 8, 9, 
> and 10 simultaneously. John 

You should be able to just remove the .-include lines.  They should not 
needed when building the first time.
